hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Numbers, Dates & the Language of Coffee Trade
lesson.menu_desc: Quantities, dates and times at Sucafina -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- Numbers, Dates and Quantities in Coffee Trade
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 3 -- Numbers & Dates

listenings.text: Hello, this is a quick update from the logistics office. We have a shipment of five hundred tons of coffee. The delivery is on March fifteenth. The deadline for the documents is March tenth. Please check the schedule and confirm the due date with the supplier. The meeting about this order is at ten in the morning. Thank you, and have a good day.

Hi, this is Daniel from the Geneva office. I read the new order today. We have two hundred kilos for the first delivery, and the rest comes later. The shipment leaves on April third. The deadline is tight, so please confirm the schedule fast. Our quarter ends soon, and we need the numbers ready. Call me when you read this. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: The logistics office sends an update. They have a shipment of five hundred tons. The delivery is on March fifteenth. The deadline for the documents is March tenth. Fernanda confirms the due date with the supplier.
